```mermaid
flowchart TD
    sk_memo_finalize["memo-finalize"]
    sk_memo_init["memo-init"]
    sk_memo_revision_generate["memo-revision-generate"]
    sk_memo_rollout["memo-rollout"]
    sk_memo_rollout_evaluate["memo-rollout-evaluate"]
    sk_memo_rollout_execute["memo-rollout-execute"]
    sk_memo_rollout_generate["memo-rollout-generate"]
    sk_memo_sop["memo-sop"]
    sk_memo_revision_generate --> sk_memo_sop
    sk_memo_finalize --> sk_memo_sop
    sk_memo_init --> sk_memo_sop
    sk_memo_rollout_evaluate --> sk_memo_rollout_execute
    sk_memo_rollout_execute --> sk_memo_rollout_generate
    sk_memo_rollout --> sk_memo_sop
```
